name: Bol.com E-Commerce Platform
description: Comprehensive bol.com system model with class, use case, and activity diagrams

systems.name: Bol.com Online Shop
systems.description: Core e-commerce system for bol.com including shopping, checkout, and seller management

diagrams.name: Bol.com Domain Class Diagram
diagrams.description: Core domain model classes covering customers, products, orders, payments and reviews

diagrams.name: Bol.com Use Case Diagram
diagrams.description: Main use cases for the bol.com platform covering customer, seller, system and payment gateway actors

diagrams.name: Bol.com Purchase Activity Diagram
diagrams.description: Activity flow for the online purchase process from browsing to order confirmation

attributes.name: parent_category_id
attributes.description: FK to parent Category for breadcrumb navigation

attributes.name: unit_price
attributes.description: Price per unit at time of purchase

attributes.name: seller_id
attributes.description: FK to the Seller fulfilling this item

attributes.name: customer_id
attributes.description: FK to Customer (null for guest carts)

attributes.name: item_count
attributes.description: Total number of items in cart

attributes.name: is_verified_purchase
attributes.description: True if reviewer actually purchased the product

attributes.name: is_default
attributes.description: True if this is the customer's default shipping address

attributes.name: kvk_number
attributes.description: Dutch Chamber of Commerce (KvK) registration number

attributes.name: ships_from
attributes.description: Country code where seller ships from

data.name: Browse Products
data.precondition: Customer is on the home or category page
data.postcondition: Customer sees a list of products

data.name: Add to Cart
data.precondition: Customer is viewing a product detail page
data.postcondition: Product is added to the customer's cart

data.name: Checkout
data.precondition: Cart contains at least one item and customer is logged in
data.postcondition: Order is placed and payment is initiated

data.name: Make Payment
data.precondition: Order has been created and customer has selected a payment method
data.postcondition: Payment is processed and order status updated

data.name: Track Order
data.postcondition: Customer sees the current delivery status

data.name: Write Review
data.precondition: Customer has purchased and received the product
data.postcondition: Review is published on the product page

data.name: Register Account
data.precondition: User does not have a bol.com account
data.postcondition: New customer account is created and verified

data.name: Login
data.postcondition: Customer is authenticated and session is created

data.name: List Product
data.precondition: Seller is logged into the seller portal
data.postcondition: Product is available for customers to purchase

data.name: Manage Inventory
data.postcondition: Stock levels and prices are updated
data.trigger: Seller updates inventory in seller portal

data.name: Process Order
data.postcondition: Order is confirmed and dispatched for fulfillment

data.name: Send Notification
data.precondition: A triggering event has occurred (order update, shipping, etc.)
data.postcondition: Customer receives an email or push notification

data.name: Apply Discount
data.precondition: Customer has a valid discount or coupon code
data.postcondition: Discount is applied and cart total is reduced
data.trigger: Customer enters a coupon code at checkout

data.name: Cancel Order
data.precondition: Order has been placed and is not yet shipped
data.postcondition: Order is cancelled and refund is initiated

data.name: Manage Returns
data.precondition: Customer received an order within the return window
data.postcondition: Return is registered and refund or replacement is issued
data.trigger: Seller or customer initiates return request

data.name: Browse / Search Products
data.localPostcondition: Product list or search results displayed

data.name: View Product Detail
data.localPostcondition: Product detail page with price, images, and reviews is shown

data.name: Add to Cart
data.localPostcondition: Item added to cart, cart total updated

data.name: Enter Shipping Information
data.localPrecondition: Customer is logged in or proceeding as guest

data.name: Select Payment Method
data.localPostcondition: Payment method is selected and order summary shown

data.name: Validate Order
data.body: Check stock availability and reserve items

data.name: Create Order Record
data.localPostcondition: Order record persisted with status confirmed
data.body: Persist order, update stock, assign to seller

data.name: Send Confirmation Email
data.body: Send order confirmation email via notification service

data.name: Notify Payment Failure
data.localPostcondition: Customer notified of failure and prompted to retry
data.body: Release stock reservation and send payment failure notification
